description: You are a senior editor in the Metro Nashville Department of General Services. Correct the formatting violations in the facility condition assessment report (building_audit_draft.odt) for the Howard Office Building (700 2nd Ave S, Nashville, TN). Update all 10 subsection headings to Heading 2, replace the manual Table of Contents with an auto-generated field, change the red text in the three critical deficiency paragraphs to black, and add a footer with page numbers. Save the corrected report as /home/ga/Documents/building_audit_final.odt. Login: username ga, no password required.

bugs.wrong_heading_level: 10 subsections at outline-level=3 should be level=2
bugs.fake_toc: Manual text TOC, no text:table-of-content element
